chapters.title: Unexpected Meeting
chapters.content: Nathan was surprised when his manager asked him to come to her office. He wondered if he had forgotten something important.

chapters.title: Good News
chapters.content: Instead of a problem, it was great news. His hard work had been noticed, and the company wanted to offer him a promotion.

chapters.title: A New Responsibility
chapters.content: Nathan accepted happily. The new role meant more responsibility, but also more opportunities to grow and lead.
